stories.title: 💶 EIB Climate Bank Roadmap Phase 2 (2026‑2030)
stories.summary: The EIB’s Phase 2 roadmap continues to anchor blended finance for adaptation—with a €30B adaptation target—supporting cities, water, and vulnerable regions alongside the competitiveness agenda.
